title: eria helleri
intro: Eria helleri, also known as the "Heller's Eria", is a type of flowering orchid native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Eria helleri is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Indian medicine to promote overall well-being.
